subcodes.first_line: In this day the Book crieth out with the most exalted call: "The Mother Book hath indeed appeared!" and all things herald the advent of the Lord of all beings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز کتاب باعلی الندآء بقد اتی ام الکتاب ناطق و اشیاء بظهور مولی الوری مبشر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @knowledge; recognition of God
